name: Almond Raspberry Tassies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix softened butter and cream cheese in a bowl.
2. Add flour to the mixture and stir until combined.
3. Cover and refrigerate.
4. Divide dough into 24 balls.
5. Press each ball onto the sides and bottom of small muffin tins.
6. Fill each shell with almond-raspberry filling.
7. Place raspberry preserves into each unbaked shell, spooning about 1/2 teaspoon per shell.
8. In a separate bowl, combine sugar and almond paste.
9. Add egg yolks one at a time to the sugar and almond paste mixture, beating well after each addition.
10. Blend in milk, orange juice, and remaining ingredients until smooth.
11. Spoon the filling into each dough-lined muffin tin shell.
12. Bake in a preheated oven set to 400°F (200°C) for 15 minutes.
13. Allow to cool before removing from the pan.
14. Store in the refrigerator or freeze as desired.
From "Rare Collection," Junior League of Galveston County.
